summary: Nice audience recording that captures a solid Dylan/Dead collaboration with a standout Chimes of Freedom.
review: The audience‑sourced tape is praised as one of the better Dylan/Dead recordings, offering clear and enjoyable sound. Reviewers highlight Jerry's prompting of Dylan and note that the performance of "Chimes of Freedom" was a memorable moment. Overall the show is viewed positively despite limited detail on set flow.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive review (4 stars) emphasizes good audio quality and an enjoyable performance, leading to a solid rating but low confidence due to limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a nice aud recording and one of the better Dylan/Dead live recordings; no specific issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; overall impression is positive.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentioned for prompting Dylan ('Jerry's prodding'), indicating active involvement.
